expectations.text: Re-engagement flow that acknowledges the silence and offers a reason to return
expectations.evidence: Email 1 acknowledges 'It's been a couple of months since you last logged into [Product name]' and Email 2 lists new product features as reasons to return.

expectations.text: Makes both staying and leaving easy
expectations.evidence: Email 4 explicitly states 'you can [cancel / pause / keep your account at no cost — whatever applies]' making exit easy while providing a login link for re-engagement.

expectations.text: Ends with suppression/removal of non-responders to protect deliverability
expectations.evidence: Post-sequence action states 'No response after Email 4: Remove from active marketing sends. Keep in a suppressed segment.'
The sequence uses empathetic framing ('I know life gets busy'), invites feedback rather than demanding action, and commits to stopping contact after Email 4.
